problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
hypothesis: The key to What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue? is Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction — specifically Monoclonal antibody blocking — which would help 19,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
